title: verify-ehbp-key-binding input
description: Input piped on stdin to `tinfoil-conformance verify-ehbp-key-binding`. Exercises Tinfoil SPEC §14.2: the EHBP HPKE public key used for the encrypted transport MUST equal the attested key carried in report_data[32:64]. Hermetic — no network; the SDK extracts the attested key from report_data using its real attestation layout constants and validates the offered key with the same HPKE key parser its EHBP transport uses.

report_data_hex.description: Hex-encoded attestation report_data. Per Tinfoil SPEC §14.2 the canonical layout is 64 bytes: [0:32] = TLS SPKI fingerprint, [32:64] = HPKE X25519 public key. Fixtures may submit a wrong length to verify the SDK fails closed on malformed report_data (exit 30).

offered_hpke_public_key_hex.description: Hex-encoded HPKE X25519 public key that a server/proxy offered for the EHBP transport (e.g. via /.well-known/hpke-keys). The SDK MUST accept it only if it equals report_data[32:64]; any other value is a key-swap and MUST be rejected. 32 bytes when well-formed; fixtures may submit a wrong length to verify the SDK rejects a malformed key.
